reviews.review_description: This game is cool! I love how the enemy drones blast through the walls!

reviews.review_title: Awesome homage to old school shooters
reviews.review_description:
It’s like if Galaga and Space Invaders mixed with Centipede and got thrown right into your living room!
It’s awesome, once the bots start blasting holes in your walls and ceiling the whole vibe changes. 

I love it
